name: Push Up
description: Start in plank position, lower your chest to the floor, then push back up. Keep your core tight throughout.

name: Squat
description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, lower your hips until thighs are parallel to the floor, then stand back up.

name: Plank
description: Hold a push-up position with arms straight. Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.

name: Pull Up
description: Hang from a bar with palms facing away, pull yourself up until your chin is above the bar, then lower slowly.

name: Lunges
description: Step forward with one leg, lower your hips until both knees are at 90 degrees, then return to start.

name: Dumbbell Curl
description: Hold dumbbells at your sides, curl them up toward your shoulders while keeping elbows close to your body.

name: Deadlift
description: Stand with feet hip-width apart, hinge at hips to grab the bar, then drive through your heels to stand up straight.

name: Shoulder Press
description: Hold dumbbells at shoulder height, press them straight up overhead until arms are fully extended, then lower slowly.
